instruction: Book an appointment to apply for a transportation access pass at the Charlie Card store on the first Monday eight months later, 10:15 am, fill in my details (James Smith, james.smith@gmail.com). And do not click "book" directly. Let me review it.

evaluator.eval: is_expected_url_pattern_match(get_active_tab_info(env, config={}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'expected': ['book/CharlieCardStoreAppointments@mbta.com/']}})) and check_direct_json_object(get_active_tab_html_parse(env, config={'category': 'class', 'class_multiObject_only_child': {'HAZ16': {'0': 'content', '1': 'time'}}}), get_rule_relativeTime()) and check_direct_json_object(get_active_tab_html_parse(env, config={'category': 'input', 'inputObject': {'/html/body/div[2]/div/form/div[7]/div/div/div[1]/input[1]': 'name', '/html/body/div[2]/div/form/div[7]/div/div/div[1]/input[2]': 'mail'}}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'expected': {'name': 'James Smith', 'mail': 'james.smith@gmail.com'}}}))
